name: Bank of America Financial Center
description_short: In Atlanta, GA, Bank of America Financial Center at 3495 Cascade Rd provides checking, savings, and loan services.
description_long:
Bank of America Financial Center at 3495 Cascade Rd in Atlanta, GA is a standalone branch offering convenient access to banking services. Located in the Cascade Road corridor of Atlanta, this branch welcomes customers during business hours: Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 4 PM. The branch is closed on weekends.

At this Atlanta location, you can open checking and savings accounts, apply for personal and business loans, discuss mortgage options, and access investment services. The branch team is available at +1 404-699-3140 to answer questions, schedule appointments, or help with specialized banking needs.

If you're an Atlanta resident visiting this Cascade Rd branch, bring a government-issued photo ID and any relevant documentation for your banking need. Whether you're opening an account, refinancing a loan, or discussing financial planning, Bank of America Financial Center provides personalized service at your convenience.
pros: Walk-up ATM with cardless payment and tap-to-pay smartphone capability
ATM accepts deposits and credit card payments for convenient self-service banking
Multilingual ATM interface in 7 languages including Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese
Full-service financial center with local specialist consultants for accounts, mortgages, and business planning
Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit (snap photo), fingerprint/Face ID, and instant confirmation
Commercial deposits accepted at this location
Notary services and non-customer check cashing available
24/7 secure online and mobile banking access to accounts
cons: Limited branch hours: closes at 4 PM weekdays and 2 PM Saturday with no Sunday service
In-person service appears appointment-based rather than walk-in friendly, potentially creating wait times
As a large national bank, may lack personalized service and niche products available at smaller institutions
ATM hours listed as 'vary at this location' with no specific times provided
No drive-thru ATM mentioned at this specific Kensington location despite cardless ATM references
best_for: Existing Bank of America customers needing in-person specialist consultations on mortgages and financial planning
Business owners seeking to make commercial deposits and meet with business banking specialists
Multilingual speakers (Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese) needing language support at ATMs
Mobile-first banking users wanting check deposit via smartphone and cardless ATM access
diagnosis: This Bank of America Financial Center is best suited for existing customers who need in-person specialist guidance on mortgages, business banking, or comprehensive financial planning in the Kensington area, or for multilingual speakers who benefit from the 7-language ATM interface. The main limitation is the appointment-dependent service model and limited hours (M-F 9 AM-4 PM, Sat 9 AM-2 PM, closed Sunday), making it less convenient for walk-in or after-hours banking needs compared to branches with extended hours.
services: Walk-up ATM with cardless payment capability
Mobile check deposit via smartphone camera
ATM deposits and credit card payment acceptance
Specialist consultations for home loans, mortgages, and refinancing
Financial planning and future savings consultations
Mobile banking app with biometric security (fingerprint/Face ID)
meta_description: Bank of America Financial Center at 3495 Cascade Rd, Atlanta, GA. Checking, savings, and loan services, Monday-Friday 9AM-4PM.
